steps.title: Substitute equation 1 into equation 2 to solve for x
steps.content:
From the first equation, $y = 3x + 9$. Substitute this into the second equation $3y = 8x - 6$:
$$3(3x + 9) = 8x - 6$$
$$9x + 27 = 8x - 6$$
$$x = -33$$

steps.title: Find y and calculate x - y
steps.content:
Use $x = -33$ in the first equation to find $y$:
$$y = 3(-33) + 9 = -99 + 9 = -90$$
Now calculate $x - y$:
$$x - y = -33 - (-90) = -33 + 90 = 57$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
